g.title: **Go/Cobra** Root, cmd, init, config, module, tui, validate, completion, audit
**Go** 8-step execution pipeline: discover, resolve definitions, validate inputs, resolve runtime, ensure SSH, build context, dry-run check, dispatch
**Go** Locates invowkfiles and modules with precedence ordering
**Go/cuelang** 3-step parsing: compile schema, unify data, decode
**Go/fsnotify** File-watching with debounced re-execution for --ivk-watch mode
**Go** Security scanning of module system. Detects supply-chain risks, path traversal, symlink abuse, env var injection. Supports --llm.
**Go/mvdan-sh** Embedded shell interpreter with u-root builtins
**Go** Creates ephemeral layers with invowk binary and modules
**Go/Wish** Enables container-to-host callbacks via SSH tunneling
**Go/Bubble Tea** HTTP server for TUI requests from child processes
